skills.name: photo-restoration
skills.description: Restore old, damaged, and faded photographs using AI. Removes scratches, tears, stains, and repairs missing areas.

skills.name: photo-colorization
skills.description: Colorize black-and-white photographs using AI. Produces natural, historically accurate color renditions.

skills.name: photo-enhancement
skills.description: Enhance photo resolution and clarity using AI upscaling. Increases resolution up to 4× while sharpening details.
